AI Lead Qualification — Live in 48 Hours

Your inbox is 80% noise.
We surface the 20% that pays.

AI reads every email, classifies hot leads, drafts replies, and archives the rest. Deployed in 48 hours. You approve every step.

The Problem

Your inbox is costing you more than you think

Three hard facts about email overwhelm — backed by what we see in every client audit.

12hper week

Average SMB owner loses 12 hours/week to email admin

Sorting, replying, archiving. Time you could spend on clients, strategy, or rest.

1 in 3hot leads

One in three hot leads gets buried in noise

Urgent client requests, partnership opportunities, sales inquiries — lost in newsletters and spam.

€800– 1,500/mo

Hiring a VA costs €800–1,500 per month

Plus training, management, turnover. And they still miss things when they are sick or on holiday.

The Solution

Inbox Killer

A digital assistant that reads your inbox, surfaces the leads that matter, and clears the rest. At a fraction of a VA's cost.

€497setup+€147/mo

First 5 clients: month 1 free. No lock-in. Cancel anytime.

  • Auto-classifies every email by intent (lead, support, noise)
  • Hot lead queue with priority scoring
  • AI-generated reply drafts tailored to your tone
  • Daily summary email — what needs your attention
  • Archives newsletters, spam, and cold outreach automatically
  • Improves every week as it learns your business
Book Free Demo
Process

From chaos to clarity in 5 steps

Transparent, fast, and human-gated at every critical step.

01

Free inbox scan

We connect to your email and audit your inbox in real time. You see exactly how much noise is hiding your leads.

02

Strategy call (20 min)

No pitch. We walk you through the scan results, diagnose your workflow, and confirm the fix fits your business.

03

Build & test (48h)

We deploy the Inbox Killer using production-hardened AI systems. You see progress in real time.

04

You approve everything

Nothing goes live without your sign-off. Zasada 11: AI executes, human decides. No black boxes.

05

Launch + 15-min training

System goes live. We train you in 15 minutes. Monthly optimization and tuning begins automatically.

Proof

Real results, real businesses

What We Build

Production systems, not promises

Real tools running in production. Built with the same systems we deploy for clients.

Client Engagement Engine

Lead Capture

Browser-based advergame built to capture leads. Custom Canvas engine. Playwright-tested. Deployed for FlexGrafik branding clients.

Self-Service Order Wizard

E-Commerce Automation

Headless WooCommerce wizard. Clients configure orders autonomously. Zero back-and-forth. 199 EUR minimum checkout.

Built on trust, not hype

We run a print and design business in Rotterdam. The same discipline governs every deployment.

No lock-in

Cancel anytime. You own your data. We export everything on request.

Human approval at every step

Zasada 11: nothing goes live without your explicit sign-off. No black boxes.

48-hour delivery promise

Standard deployment is 48 hours. If scope creeps, we tell you upfront.

“I built these systems to automate my own operations. Now I use them to help other small businesses modernize — because you deserve tools that big companies pay six figures for.”

— Norbert Wozniak, FlexGrafik
